state_variables.name: pending_question
state_variables.description: Store the latest clarification question so the next turn can answer it

state_variables.name: risk_flag
state_variables.description: Whether the latest user turn hit a red flag path

state_variables.name: red_flag_payload
state_variables.description: Structured JSON-like summary for the latest detected red flag

state_variables.name: followup_turn_count
state_variables.description: Number of consecutive clarification turns in the current follow-up chain

state_variables.name: active_mode
state_variables.description: Last resolved routing mode for the current turn

state_variables.name: latest_tag_payload
state_variables.description: Structured tag output for the latest normal user turn

state_variables.name: hamd_progress_state
state_variables.description: Structured HAM-D progress snapshot for mission mode

state_variables.name: summary_draft_state
state_variables.description: Unified pre-summary state for future clinician draft generation

state_variables.name: clinician_summary_draft
state_variables.description: Clinician-facing draft summary generated from the unified summary state

state_variables.name: routing_mode_override
state_variables.description: Persisted manual routing mode override; auto means automatic routing

state_variables.name: command_feedback
state_variables.description: Short confirmation text for command-mode switches

state_variables.name: patient_review_packet
state_variables.description: Patient-facing review packet generated from clinician summary draft

state_variables.name: fhir_delivery_draft
state_variables.description: Draft FHIR/TW Core delivery payload generated from reviewed summary state

state_variables.name: mission_retrieval_audit
state_variables.description: Retrieval governance snapshot for mission mode knowledge usage

state_variables.name: option_retrieval_audit
state_variables.description: Retrieval governance snapshot for option mode knowledge usage

state_variables.name: burden_level_state
state_variables.description: Structured burden and response-style state for cognitive load aware routing and replies

state_variables.name: patient_authorization_state
state_variables.description: Structured review and consent readiness state derived from the patient review packet

state_variables.name: delivery_readiness_state
state_variables.description: Structured pre-delivery readiness state for FHIR and clinician export workflows

writes.value: 已切回 auto 模式，之後會重新依照使用者語氣與內容自動分流。
已切換到 void 模式，之後會優先維持樹洞式接住，直到你輸入其他模式指令或 auto。
已切換到 soulmate 模式，之後會優先維持陪伴式互動，直到你輸入其他模式指令或 auto。
已切換到 mission 模式，之後會優先維持任務整理與診前引導，直到你輸入其他模式指令或 auto。
已切換到 option 模式，之後會優先用低負擔選項式互動，同時保留量表線索，直到你輸入其他模式指令或 auto。
已切換到 natural 模式，之後會優先用自然互動蒐集線索，直到你輸入其他模式指令或 auto。
已切換到 clarify 模式，之後會優先用最小補問來釐清資訊，直到你輸入其他模式指令或 auto。
